text:
Created attachment 146498
svn diff

(1)The update provides options on par with original lib source, except share lib part.  
(2) change static lib to be shared lib by default, which is required in my another ports.  
(3) about 8.4 release broken: the issue will be resolved by adding one include file. There is one line missing in 8.4 tcp.h file.
